utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items are present. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: specified as Barcelona, Spain — complete. 2) travel_dates: specific dates June 12-16, 2024 and duration — complete. 3) transportation: flights specified with route, class, airline type, costs per person and total — reasonably complete. 4) accommodation: hotel name, star rating, location, nightly rate, nights, total — complete. 5) activities: listed with individual costs and totals, including per-person breakdowns — complete. 6) additional_services: dining plan with itemized restaurants and costs, total — complete. 7) total_budget: complete breakdown summing categories and total vs budget — complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item mentioned in the final package and map it to the exact matching entry in the ground-truth ratings. The package includes: destination (Barcelona, Spain), transportation (Budget Airlines Economy), accommodation (Cityscape Hotel), activities (City Walking Tour, Golf Day, Museum Day Pass), and restaurants/dining (Italian Trattoria, Vegan Bistro, Seafood Restaurant, French Café). Find each in the ground-truth and return their numeric ratings.
